channel.title: Project Super-R on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Project Super-R on CEDIS

item.title: Super r
item.description: Educational project, part of the ‘Software Requirements’ course, an educational innovation developed by CEDIS at the University of Brasília.

item.title: Products
item.description: 2025 technological product proposing a chatbot as a support tool for Requirements Engineering.
